reviews.review_title: Lots of promise here. Get rid of RSR.
reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: Red Sands Race is an obnoxiously, unnecessarily challenging and frustrating level. Hate.

Currently, this game is in its infant stages, but it already has a lot to offer. The controls are actually relatively advanced, and surprisingly quite smooth, with little to be ironed out. Graphics are simple, but fine-tuning with textures and shaders should come with time. The worlds/levels are decently-sized and creatively designed. I really like the upgrade system! Extractor has a simple but balanced premise: collect crystals and defend yourself. I'm interested to see where this goes.

Nice game for its price. Once you learn the controls it is quite cool.

I find the ”red sands race” way to hard, and the other a bit too easy. 

Multiplayer would give it a 5 I am sure

The game is awesome, would have put 5 stars  BUT there is a very annoying BUG! While driving the space ship, it often suddenly steers to the left even if not touching the thumbsticks at all! Only way to get out of this is to stop touching ANY control, including the grips which allow you to not fall down while mid air. PLEASE FIX! (running on meta quest 3)

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comment. What device are you using? 
Please try reinstalling the game. That should possibly help.

reviews.review_description: This is the first time I go out of my way to review a game. The game has so much potential and can’t believe it’s free. I feel like I’m actually piloting a helicopter trying to extract crystals while dodging and eliminating enemies. Can’t wait to see what’s next from the developers!
This is a Great game with a lot to offer! Can't wait until the Developers put more in it!

Once my stomach got used to it, I thought it was heaps of fun. Ace chopper pilot, wee. Mine the crystals, easy. Dodge and shoot the baddies, err also a bit easy (hope it gets harder, have only finished first world, I think missiles should be faster, make em harder to dodge). Loving the controls (imagining No Mans Sky like this 😀). Good game and FREE.

Edit: yes this game gets harder and better, the dog fights can be hard on guts, but having a ball 8)
..... omg!, can't get passed the race now. Those rings are moving!. Aaaargh..

The game already works quite well, offers a lot from my perspective, and is fun.

Flying works well and is easy to handle (though it might cause motion sickness in VR beginners). Mining works fine, shooting fits the bill. What I'm missing is a bit of atmosphere (graphics, elements, music, sound).
